name: Grilled Glazed Tuna Steaks
recipeIngredient: 4 Tuna steaks cut into 4 pieces each (1 pound total)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-cup glass measure, combine the dry sherry, gingerroot, soy sauce, honey, and garlic.
2. Microwave uncovered at high until the mixture boils, about 1 minute.
3. Cool slightly.
4. Place the tuna in an 11 x 7 x 1 1/2-inch baking dish.
5. Pour the marinade over the tuna. Cover and chill for 2 hours.
6. Remove the tuna from the marinade, reserving the marinade.
7. Preheat a 10-inch browning skillet at high until hot, about 8 minutes.
8. Arrange the tuna on the hot browning skillet with the thickest portions toward the outside.
9. Microwave uncovered at high for 2 to 3 minutes.
10. Turn the steaks over and baste with marinade. Microwave again at high for 1 1/2 to 2 more minutes.
11. Let stand covered for 2 minutes before serving immediately with warm marinade. (May also grill outdoors.)
